description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The structure features large windows arranged in horizontal bands, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front includes a paved driveway with a carport supported by two columns, and a small landscaped area with grass on either side. The rear of the house has a partially covered patio or terrace area, likely for outdoor seating or dining. The exterior is primarily finished in white and light gray, with some wooden accent panels adding warmth to the design. The house sits on a long, narrow plot, maximizing the use of space with a linear layout.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large horizontal windows, a carport, and a long, narrow footprint. The exterior is white and gray with wood accents and landscaped grass areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, driveway, main entrance, and landscaped grass strips.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, linear structure, horizontal window bands, and carport on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio/terrace area and the back entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, window arrangement, and carport on the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: horizontal bands of large windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat-roofed carport, two supporting columns, paved steps, and a minimalist door design
